channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-20177] Directory migration failed Directory not empty (39)
item.description:
this test fails with error 39

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

MDTEST_BIN="/home/rocky/build/ior/src/mdtest"
dirname="/mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir"

echo "Using dir: $dirname"
echo "Using mdtest: $MDTEST_BIN"
rm -fr $dirname
sudo lctl set_param mdt.*.enable_dir_restripe=1
sudo lctl set_param mdt.*.dir_restripe_nsonly=0

  1. Ensure parent directory exists
    sudo chown "$USER:$USER" /mnt/lustre
    if [ ! -d "/mnt/lustre/rajeevm" ]; then
    echo "Creating parent dir /mnt/lustre/rajeevm ..."
    sudo mkdir -p /mnt/lustre/rajeevm
    sudo chown "$USER:$USER" /mnt/lustre/rajeevm
    fi
  1. Clean old test dir (optional)
    if [ -e "$dirname" ]; then
    sudo rm -rf "$dirname"
    fi

echo "=== sudo lfs mkdir --mdt-index 1 --mdt-count 2 $dirname ==="

  1. Create target dir on MDTs
    sudo lfs mkdir --mdt-index 1 --mdt-count 2 "$dirname"
    sudo chown "$USER:$USER" "$dirname"
    echo "=== $MDTEST_BIN -w 16384 -f 1 -l 1 -i 1 -C -n 500 -t -T -v -v -E -d $dirname -u ==="
  2. Run mdtest (single-process, no MPI launcher)
    #"$MDTEST_BIN" -w 16384 -f 1 -l 1 -i 2 -C -n 50000 -t -T -v -v -E -d "$dirname" -u
    "$MDTEST_BIN" -w 16384 -f 1 -l 1 -i 1 -C -n 1 -t -T -v -v -E -d "$dirname" -u
    echo "=== Enabling all Lustre debug ==="
    sudo lctl set_param debug=+all
    sudo lctl set_param debug_mb=256
    sudo lctl clear
    sudo lctl mark "=== START OF RAJEEV DEBUG Migrate ==="
  1. Repro step: migrate
    sudo lfs migrate -v --mdt-index 0 --mdt-count 1 "$dirname"
    sudo lctl mark "=== END OF RAJEEV DEBUG Migrate ==="
    sudo lctl dk > /tmp/lustre-migrate-debug.log
    sudo lctl set_param debug=0
    echo "Log saved to /tmp/lustre-migrate-debug.log"
    echo "Done."

tree.0.0
V-1: Rank 0 Line 611 Entering mdtest_read on /mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir/#test-dir.0-0/mdtest_tree.0.0
V-1: Rank 0 Line 1219 File creation : 0.009 sec, 109.879 ops/sec
V-1: Rank 0 Line 1223 File stat : 0.001 sec, 950.243 ops/sec
V-1: Rank 0 Line 1224 File read : 0.004 sec, 264.120 ops/sec
V-1: Rank 0 Line 1225 File removal : 0.000 sec, 0.000 ops/sec
V-1: Rank 0 Line 1237 Entering summarize_results...

SUMMARY rate: (of 1 iterations)
Operation Max Min Mean Std Dev
--------- — — ---- -------
Directory creation : 192.335 192.335 192.335 0.000
Directory stat : 442.647 442.647 442.647 0.000
Directory removal : 0.000 0.000 0.000 0.000
File creation : 109.879 109.879 109.879 0.000
File stat : 950.243 950.243 950.243 0.000
File read : 264.120 264.120 264.120 0.000
File removal : 0.000 0.000 0.000 0.000
Tree creation : 197.015 197.015 197.015 0.000
Tree removal : 0.000 0.000 0.000 0.000
V-1: Entering PrintTimestamp...
– finished at 04/21/2026 15:30:59 –

=== Enabling all Lustre debug ===
debug=+all
debug_mb=256
migrate /mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir to MDT0 stripe count 1
/mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir/#test-dir.0-0 migrated to MDT0 already
/mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir/#test-dir.0-0/mdtest_tree.0.0 migrated to MDT0 already
migrate /mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir/#test-dir.0-0/mdtest_tree.0.0/file.mdtest.0.0 to MDT0 stripe count 1
/mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir/#test-dir.0-0/mdtest_tree.0.0/dir.mdtest.0.0 migrated to MDT0 already
lfs migrate: cb_migrate_mdt_fini: error completing migration of /mnt/lustre/rajeevm/test_dir: Directory not empty (39)
item.summary: Directory migration failed Directory not empty (39)

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Rajeev Mishra <rajeevm@hpe.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65469
Subject: LU-20177 mdt: Directory migration fails with not-empty error
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 2561cb016a9c7d6aa9332265a0af5d9359d8a87c

added test 230B in sanity.sh which fails
== sanity test 230B: dir migrate shrink cleans stale stripe name entries (LU-20177) ========================================================== 17:10:23 (1776877823)
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.enable_dir_restripe
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.dir_restripe_nsonly
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.enable_dir_restripe=1
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.enable_dir_restripe=1
mdt.lustre-MDT0001.enable_dir_restripe=1
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.dir_restripe_nsonly=0
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.dir_restripe_nsonly=0
mdt.lustre-MDT0001.dir_restripe_nsonly=0
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl get_param -n debug
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=ha
total: 500 create in 0.06 seconds: 8990.54 ops/second
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=trace+inode+super+iotrace+malloc+cache+info+ioctl+neterror+net+warning+buffs+other+dentry+nettrace+page+dlmtrace+error+emerg+ha+rpctrace+vfstrace+reada+mmap+config+console+quota+sec+lfsck+hsm+snapshot+layout
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=trace+inode+super+iotrace+malloc+cache+info+ioctl+neterror+net+warning+buffs+other+dentry+nettrace+page+dlmtrace+error+emerg+ha+rpctrace+vfstrace+reada+mmap+config+console+quota+sec+lfsck+hsm+snapshot+layout
total: 10 mkdir in 0.01 seconds: 1015.45 ops/second
lfs migrate: cb_migrate_mdt_fini: error completing migration of /mnt/lustre/d230B.sanity: Directory not empty (39)
sanity test_230B: @@@@@@ FAIL: expected 1 stripe after migrate, got 3
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7402:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:26132:test_230B()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7778:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7841:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7641:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:26142:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/2026-04-22/171013/sanity.test_230B.*.1776877831.log
Dumping logs only on local client.
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.dir_restripe_nsonly=1
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.dir_restripe_nsonly=1
mdt.lustre-MDT0001.dir_restripe_nsonly=1
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.enable_dir_restripe=0
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.enable_dir_restripe=0
mdt.lustre-MDT0001.enable_dir_restripe=0
FAIL 230B (8s)
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.max_stripes_per_mdt
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param -n lod.lustre-MDT*.max_stripes_per_mdt=5
CMD: whambuild.novalocal /sbin/lctl set_param -n lod.lustre-MDT*.max_stripes_per_mdt=5
== sanity test complete, duration 17 sec ================= 17:10:33 (1776877833)
sanity: FAIL: test_230B expected 1 stripe after migrate, got 3
=== sanity: start cleanup 17:10:33 (1776877833) ===
=== sanity: finish cleanup 17:10:39 (1776877839) ===
debug=super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console lfsck
sanity.sh returned 1
Finished at Wed Apr 22 05:10:39 PM UTC 2026 in 26s

will test with the fix
